title: Formatting Names
scenario: We have a list of names in different formats. Some are in title case, some are in lowercase, and some are in uppercase. Please write a Python function that takes a list of names and returns a list of names in title case.
constraints: Must use a Python 3.8 or higher function

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python function meets the constraints
Check if the Python function has valid syntax
Check if the Python function is readable and follows best practices
